# matomo_tagmanager_variable_metacontent (Resource)

Reads a value from a "meta" HTML element.

## Example Usage

```terraform
provider "matomo" {}

resource "matomo_site" "example" {
  name = "Example MetaContent Site"
  urls = ["https://example-metacontent.example.com"]
}

resource "matomo_tagmanager_container" "example" {
  site_id = matomo_site.example.id
  context = "web"
  name    = "Example MetaContent Container"
}

resource "matomo_tagmanager_variable_metacontent" "example" {
  container_id = matomo_tagmanager_container.example.id
  name         = "example-metacontent"
  meta_name = "application-name"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `container_id` (String)
- `meta_name` (String)
- `name` (String)

### Optional

- `default_value` (String)
- `description` (String) Optional free-text description, shown in Matomo's Tag Manager UI.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
